str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - developer-preparation
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Deal with the Pressure of Coding Interviews
entry.summary: In today's fast-paced tech industry, coding interviews have become an inevitable part of the hiring process. While they can be daunting for even the most seasoned developers, this blog post offers a comprehensive guide to help you ace coding interviews with confidence. With 10 tips covering everything from preparation and communication skills to problem-solving and soft skills, we'll provide you with all the tools you need to succeed in your tech career. Whether you're a junior developer or an experienced programmer, this guide is essential reading for anyone looking to improve their coding interview performance. So, grab a cup of coffee, settle down, and let's get started!
